items.name: Sword of Glowing Hope
items.description: Even in the deepest darkness, there is hope in the flash of my blade. This sword is lit up so it's bright in dark places and slightly glows. Slash at your enemies dealing 17 damage per hit. Upon slashing enemies, sparks emit out of the sword. Anybody killed will burst into neon green flame particles and vanish.

items.name: Black Emo Chain Cross Grunge Neck Scarf
items.description:
More versions - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Grunge+Scarf&Category=1&CreatorName=Manwire+UGC&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

More Manwire UGC here - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Manwire%20UGC&salesTypeFilter=1

Black Emo Chain Cross Grunge Neck Scarf fuses dark street style with raw emotion and alt-core edge. Featuring a distressed black fabric detailed with hanging chains and a metal cross charm, this scarf delivers the perfect blend of emo, goth, and grunge aesthetics.
